privileged_info_summary: Task involves processing a partial credit note (40% refund) in Odoo ERP for customer 'Northstar Industrial Solutions'. Original invoice total: $1,860.00 (20 Industrial Safety Helmets @ $45.00 + 30 High-Visibility Safety Vests @ $32.00). Return request specifies 8 helmets ($360.00) + 12 vests ($384.00) = $744.00 refund. All data is synthetic, created during task initialization with no external data sources. Correct task completion requires identifying the original invoice, issuing a partial credit note for the specified items only (not a full refund), posting the credit note, and registering the refund payment.
